design_philosophy: Functional Minimalism & Trust-First Design. This mobile app for Indonesian UMKM (Small/Medium Businesses) and freelancers avoids the sterile, cold 'SaaS tech' look. Instead, it leans into 'membumi' (grounded/down-to-earth) aesthetics using warm stone whites, deep forest greens, and high-legibility typography suitable for financial tracking. The UI must feel instantly familiar, fast for one-handed mobile use, and project professional credibility when sending invoices to clients.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green. Conveys growth, wealth, and local familiarity (similar to major Indonesian super-apps).

accent.description: Terracotta. Used for overdue states, urgent nudges, and destructive actions.

rules: Use IBM Plex Sans for all numeric displays (invoice totals, PPN, dates) to ensure tabular lining and crisp readability.
Headings must use Manrope for a rounded, approachable, yet professional tone.
Never center-align financial totals; always right-align them in lists/tables.

mobile_specifics: Use bottom-sheet patterns for 'Add Line Item' and 'Change Status' instead of full-page navigation.
Main Call-to-Action (CTA) buttons must be sticky at the bottom of the screen (pb-safe + 4) for easy thumb reach.
Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use 1px borders (border-neutral-200) to separate list items.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white h-14 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center text-lg active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-neutral-200 text-neutral-900 h-14 rounded-xl font-medium flex items-center justify-center active:bg-neutral-50
buttons.whatsapp_share: bg-[#25D366] text-white h-14 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98]

inputs.text_field: bg-neutral-100 border-0 rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-base text-neutral-900 placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20
inputs.amount_field: bg-white border-b-2 border-neutral-200 px-0 py-4 text-3xl font-semibold text-neutral-900 placeholder:text-neutral-300 focus:border-primary text-right

cards.invoice_list_item: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-2 active:bg-neutral-50
cards.client_item: bg-white border-b border-neutral-100 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

navigation.bottom_tab: bg-white border-t border-neutral-200 h-20 pb-safe pt-2 flex justify-around items-center

components.status_badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

motion.transitions: Spring animations for screen transitions and bottom sheets.
interactions: Smooth height animation when toggling PPN on/off in the invoice builder.
Skeleton loaders for fetching invoice lists instead of native spinners.

usage_rules: Use filled variants only for active states in Bottom Tab Navigation.
Key icons: FileText (Invoices), Users (Clients), Building (Profile), Send (Share), Receipt (PDF Preview).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Neutral-500 is the lightest allowed text on Neutral-100 backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48 logical pixels for all clickable elements.

auth_hero.description: Image of a freelancer working on a laptop. Use as the hero/background image on the Google Auth Login screen with a gradient overlay (black/40) for text legibility.

empty_state_invoices.description: Close-up of a desk setup. Use selectively for empty states or onboarding.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native mobile application. Apply these design guidelines using standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) if configured.
Do not build a generic web dashboard layout. Ensure 'sticky bottom actions', 'safe area padding (pb-safe/pt-safe)', and mobile-native scrolling.
The Home/Dashboard screen should focus heavily on the 'Total Tagihan' (Total Receivables) in large `financial_large` text, followed by the filterable list of invoices.
The PDF template for `expo-print` must look hyper-professional, using the saved business profile (logo, NPWP, signature). Format currency strictly to Indonesian Rupiah (Rp X.XXX.XXX).
WhatsApp integration is paramount: the CTA should be highly prominent and utilize the `#25D366` brand color, triggering the `Linking.openURL` with the pre-filled Bahasa Indonesia message.
NEVER use placeholder text for logos or images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs or handle them via Expo Image Picker for user uploads.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` properties for robust testing.
